subject: [PATCH v2 098/110] udf: replace PRIino with %llu/%llx format strings

reviews.author: Jeff Linux-f2fs-devel
reviews.summary: Reviewer noted that the patch replaces PRIino format macro with %llu/%llx format strings, but did not verify if all occurrences of PRIino have been replaced correctly.

reviews.author: Jan Kara
reviews.summary: Reviewer noted that the patch looks good and is ready for inclusion, requesting only a Reviewed-by tag from himself.
reviews.raw_body:
Looks good. Feel free to add:

Reviewed-by: Jan Kara <jack@suse.cz>

								Honza

2026-03-02.patch_summary: This patch replaces the PRIino format macro with concrete format strings in the UDF file system code, specifically in the directory.c, file.c, inode.c, namei.c, and super.c files. The change is necessary because i_ino is now a u64 type and PRIino has been removed. The patch updates various error messages to use %llu or %llx format strings instead of PRIino, ensuring that large inode numbers are printed correctly.
